top_signals.title: Cosmo Oil tanker from Mexico to arrive in Japan by Friday
top_signals.summary: A tanker carrying Mexican crude oil for Cosmo Oil, a unit of Cosmo Energy, is expected to arrive in Japan as early as Friday, Japan’s industry ministry said. This marks the first arrival of Mexican crude in Japan since the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran began in late February, the Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry ...

top_signals.title: FUJAIRAH DATA: Oil product stocks edge up on light distillates
top_signals.summary: Oil product inventories at Fujairah in the UAE inched up 0.2% in the week ended July 13, led by a 12% rise in light distillate stocks, according to Fujairah Oil Industry Zone data published July 15.
